items.name: TH Monogram Hat
items.description:
The new mark of distinction. Inspired by our heritage, but designed for tomorrow — our Monogram is a modern take on a time-honoured icon. The all-over jacquard monogram features a stitched outline that adds a soft, slightly quilted texture to this classic bucket hat. 

This is a collectable item. 

First drop available on 9-11-22 from 7:30 pm EDT until 9:30 pm EDT Second drop available on 9-12-22 from 4:30 pm UTC until 6:30 pm UTC.
